title: Specify discovery lead
description: Validates a single raw, unmerged `Lead` block under `## Lead inventory` in `discovery.md` per workflow §Discovery handshake. Each block is one lead as surfaced by one source: a `source` naming the binding that produced it, a kebab-case `lead` (unique only within that `source`), and a content-bearing per-source `synopsis`. Identity is the `(source, lead)` pair; the same `lead` MAY appear under different source keys, and cross-source unification is deferred to `/spec:plan`'s plan-time `propose` sub-step. `slices[].sources[].lead` resolves against the canonical `lead` id within the binding's `source`.

lead.description: Stable kebab-case lead identifier, unique only within its `source`. Re-survey of that source replaces the block by `(source, lead)`.

source.description: Source binding key that surfaced this lead (matches a top-level `plan.yaml.sources.<key>` binding). A `survey` attributes every lead it produces to its own source key.

synopsis.description: Reconciliation-grade per-source headline of the lead as this source surfaced it. SHOULD name the operation/surface and its salient constraint distinctly enough that a same-slug lead from another source can be matched or distinguished on content, not just the slug. MAY span more than one line when one is too thin. Plan-time headline material only — never a back-door for slice-time `Evidence`, which remains the job of `extract`.
